title: Has Brexit made Europe stronger or weaker? MEPs go face-to-face on The Ring

title: Iceland kills first whales since 2023, resuming whaling

title: EU sets stage for decoupling Moldova's accession bid from Ukraine's

title: Pay transparency isn't only about women. It exposes inequalities affecting millions of workers

title: Didier Deschamps to miss France's match against Norway following the death of his mother

title: Lithuania PM Ruginienė resigns after less than a year in office
